title: 10 best herbal essential oils for grief
intro_desc: Herbal essential oils for grief are a natural and effective way to manage emotional distress and promote emotional healing after loss. These oils, derived from plants such as lavender, bergamot, and ylang-ylang, release soothing fragrances that calm the mind and emotions, allowing individuals to process their grief in a healthy manner. By inhaling these oils, individuals can experience reduced anxiety, improved mood, and increased emotional resilience, ultimately improving overall well-being and helping them find peace during times of sorrow.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: English lavender essential oils helps with grief because it has a calming and soothing effect on the mind and body. The gentle, floral scent of lavender oil can help to reduce stress and anxiety, allowing individuals to process their emotions in a more peaceful state. Additionally, the oil's relaxing properties can promote better sleep, which is often disrupted during times of grief. By using English lavender essential oils, individuals can find comfort and solace as they navigate the difficult journey of healing and moving forward.
remedy_properties: Calming and Sedative Properties: English lavender essential oil has a calming effect on the nervous system, which can help to soothe emotional pain and reduce anxiety associated with grief.

Antidepressant and Anti-Anxiety Effects: The essential oil contains compounds like linalool and linalyl acetate, which have been shown to have antidepressant and anti-anxiety properties, helping to alleviate feelings of sadness and hopelessness.

Inflammation Reduction: English lavender essential oil has anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to reduce physical symptoms associated with grief, such as headaches, muscle tension, and insomnia.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of English lavender are used to make essential oils that help alleviate emotional pain and promote feelings of calmness during periods of grief.
Barks: The barks of the plant contain flavonoids that have anti-inflammatory properties, which can help soothe the emotional distress associated with grief.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh or dried lavender flowers in late morning to ensure maximum oil content and quality.
Dry the harvested lavender flowers in a well-ventilated area for 7-10 days to reduce moisture levels.
Steam distill the dried lavender flowers using a still or apparatus at 100°c for 90 minutes to extract the essential oil.
Combine the extracted essential oil with a carrier oil such as coconut or sweet almond oil in a ratio of 1:2 for blending and dilution purposes.
Store the prepared essential oil blend in dark glass bottles with tight-fitting lids away from direct sunlight and heat for up to 6 months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Sage essential oils helps with grief because it has a calming and soothing effect on the mind and body. The scent of sage is known to promote emotional balance, clarity, and insight, allowing individuals to process their emotions more effectively. It also reduces stress and anxiety, which can often exacerbate feelings of grief. By using sage essential oils, individuals can find solace in its gentle yet powerful calming properties, helping them to navigate the challenging emotional landscape of grief with greater ease and support.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: Herbal sage essential oil's antioxidant properties help to reduce oxidative stress and inflammation, which can exacerbate feelings of grief and emotional pain.

Anti-inflammatory properties: The anti-inflammatory properties of sage oil may help to reduce physical symptoms of grief, such as headaches and fatigue, allowing the individual to focus on their emotional healing process.
Anxiolytic (anxiety-reducing) properties: Sage oil's anxiolytic properties can help to calm the mind and body, reducing feelings of anxiety and panic that often accompany grief.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of sage contain a high concentration of sesquiterpenes, which help to calm and soothe emotional pain associated with grief.
Barks: The barks of sage are rich in antioxidants and flavonoids, which work together to reduce inflammation and promote feelings of calmness during times of grieving.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh or dried salvia officinalis leaves and stems from the plant.
Dry the plant material in a warm dark place for at least two weeks.
Steam distill the dried plant material using 10% of its weight in water.
Collect the resulting essential oil after a minimum of three hours distillation time.
Filter the essential oil through a coffee filter or cheesecloth to remove impurities.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Lemon balm essential oils helps with grief because its calming and soothing properties can provide comfort to those who are struggling to cope with loss. The herb's natural sedative effects can help ease anxiety and stress, allowing individuals to process their emotions in a more peaceful state. Additionally, lemon balm's uplifting aroma can promote relaxation and reduce feelings of overwhelm, helping to create a sense of calm and tranquility that can aid in the healing process.
remedy_properties: Antidepressant properties: Lemon balm essential oil has been shown to possess antidepressant effects, which can help alleviate feelings of sadness and hopelessness associated with grief.
Anxiolytic (anxiety-reducing) properties: The anxiolytic properties of lemon balm essential oil can help reduce anxiety and stress related to grief, promoting a sense of calm and relaxation.

Emotional balancing properties: Lemon balm essential oil has been traditionally used to balance emotions, which can help stabilize mood swings and promote emotional equilibrium during the grieving process.
remedy_parts: Roots: Lemon balm roots are good for calming and soothing emotional distress, helping to alleviate feelings of grief and sadness.
Flowers: Lemon balm flowers promote a sense of balance and harmony, which can help alleviate feelings of despair and hopelessness often associated with grief.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh melissa officinalis leaves and flowers in the morning when dew is still present.
Dry the harvested material by spreading it out in a single layer on paper towels for 7-10 days.
Steam distill 100g of dried melissa officinalis leaves and flowers with 500ml water for 90 minutes.
Separate the essential oil from the distilled water using a separating funnel and store in dark glass bottle at room temperature.
Blend 20 drops of melissa officinalis essential oil with 10ml of jojoba carrier oil for topical application.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: St John's wort essential oils helps with grief because it has a profound ability to ease emotional pain and promote feelings of calm and serenity. The oil is known for its antidepressant properties, which can help alleviate the intense sadness and despair that often accompany loss. By reducing anxiety and stress, St John's wort essential oil creates an environment conducive to processing emotions and finding closure. Its calming scent also helps to soothe a troubled mind, allowing individuals to rest and recharge during times of great emotional need.
remedy_properties: Antidepressant properties: St. John's Wort essential oil has been shown to have antidepressant effects, which can help alleviate feelings of sadness and hopelessness associated with grief.
Anti-inflammatory properties: The anti-inflammatory properties of St. John's Wort essential oil may help reduce emotional inflammation and stress responses that can exacerbate grief.

Antioxidant properties: St. John's Wort essential oil's antioxidant properties can help protect the body from oxidative stress, which can contribute to feelings of anxiety and despair often experienced during times of grief.
remedy_parts: Roots: St John's Wort roots have a calming and soothing effect, making them ideal for addressing emotional pain and promoting relaxation.
Flowers: The flowers of St John's Wort contain the highest concentration of hyperforin, which has been shown to have antidepressant properties, helping to alleviate feelings of sadness and grief.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh st. john's wort flowers at dawn on a sunny day to ensure maximum oil content.
Dry the harvested flowers using a dehydrator or air circulation for 24 hours to reduce moisture levels.
Steam distill the dried flowers in a 10ml capacity still pot for 4 hours with 1 liter of distilled water.
Filter and decant the resulting essential oil into dark glass bottles within 2 weeks of production.
Store the hypericum perforatum essential oil at room temperature away from direct sunlight for up to 6 months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Damask rose essential oils helps with grief because of its calming and comforting properties, which can ease the emotional pain of loss. The oil's sweet, floral scent has a way of soothing the mind and spirit, promoting relaxation and reducing feelings of anxiety and sadness. Its gentle, warming quality also helps to release emotional blockages, allowing individuals to process their emotions more freely and begin the healing journey.
remedy_properties: Antidepressant: Damask Rose essential oil has been shown to have antidepressant properties, which can help alleviate feelings of sadness and hopelessness associated with grief, promoting emotional balance and well-being.
Anti-anxiety: The oil's anti-anxiety effects can help reduce feelings of worry, fear, and anxiety that often accompany the grieving process, allowing individuals to feel more calm and centered.

Emollient and soothing: Damask Rose essential oil has emollient and soothing properties, which can help comfort and calm the emotional distress associated with grief, promoting a sense of relaxation and peace.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the damask rose plant are used to make essential oils for grief because they contain a high concentration of soothing compounds that can help alleviate emotional pain.
Buds: The buds of the damask rose plant are used to create essential oils for grief because they have a calming effect on the nervous system, which can help reduce feelings of anxiety and stress.
remedy_recipe: Harvest rosa damascena flowers in full bloom, gathering at least 100 grams of fresh or dried petals for optimal oil yield.
Steam distill the harvested flowers using a still with a 10:1 ratio of water to plant material, running the process for three hours.
Collect and filter the resulting essential oil, ensuring a clear, pale yellow liquid with a minimum 30% camphor content.
Dilute the rosa damascena essential oil with a carrier oil such as jojoba or sweet almond oil in a 2:1 ratio to enhance absorption and therapeutic benefits.
Store the finished herbal essential oil in dark glass bottles, tightly sealed and kept at room temperature, for up to six months to preserve its medicinal properties and emotional healing potential.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Curry plant essential oils helps with grief because it has a profound impact on emotional well-being. The oil's sweet, spicy aroma is known to uplift and calm the mind and body, providing relief from feelings of sadness and despair. It also has a grounding effect, helping individuals stay present in the moment rather than getting lost in painful memories or worries about the future. By promoting a sense of balance and harmony, curry plant essential oil can aid in the healing process, supporting those navigating grief towards a path of peace and acceptance.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory: Helps reduce swelling and discomfort associated with emotional pain, making it easier to manage grief.
Antidepressant: Has been shown to alleviate symptoms of depression, which is often linked to grief and loss.
Sedative: Can help calm the mind and body, promoting relaxation and reducing anxiety that may accompany grieving.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the curry plant have a calming effect on the mind and body, making them well-suited for crafting essential oils to alleviate symptoms of grief.
Barks: The barks of the curry plant contain compounds that help reduce anxiety and stress, which can contribute to feelings of grief.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 2 cups of fresh helichrysum italicum flowers on a sunny day for optimal potency.
Dry the harvested flowers in a warm, dry, dark place for 7-10 days or until crumbly.
Steam distill the dried helichrysum italicum flowers with 30 grams of distilled water at atmospheric pressure for 2 hours.
Collect the resulting essential oil and separate it from impurities using filter paper or a coffee filter within 24 hours of distillation.
Store the finished helichrysum italicum essential oil in dark glass bottles with tight-fitting lids, away from direct sunlight, heat, and humidity for up to 1 year.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Pot marigold essential oils helps with grief because of its soothing and comforting properties. The oil's anti-inflammatory compounds can ease emotional pain and reduce feelings of anxiety, allowing individuals to process their emotions more effectively. Additionally, the oil's calming scent can promote relaxation and tranquility, helping to quiet a racing mind and bring a sense of peace during difficult times. As a result, pot marigold essential oils can be a valuable tool in supporting mental well-being and facilitating the grieving process.
remedy_properties: Antidepressant and Anti-Anxiety Properties: Pot Marigold essential oil contains compounds like flavonoids and terpenes that have been shown to reduce anxiety and depression by inhibiting the reuptake of serotonin and dopamine in the brain, helping to alleviate feelings of sadness and hopelessness.

Anti-Inflammatory and Antispasmodic Properties: The essential oil's anti-inflammatory properties can help reduce physical tension and discomfort associated with grief, such as headaches or muscle aches, while its antispasmodic properties can ease emotional pain and promote relaxation.

Antioxidant and Immune-Boosting Properties: Pot Marigold essential oil contains antioxidants that can help protect the body from oxidative stress and inflammation, which can exacerbate feelings of grief and sadness, while its immune-boosting properties can support overall physical and mental well-being.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds, roots help alleviate emotional pain and soothe the mind during periods of grief.
Flowers: Known for their calming and uplifting properties, flowers promote relaxation and reduce anxiety, allowing individuals to cope with loss more effectively.
remedy_recipe: Harvest calendula flowers in their peak bloom state at dawn on a sunny day with scissors or clippers.
Dry the harvested calendula flowers for 7-10 days using a single-layer tray and air circulation.
Steam distill 100g of dried calendula flowers in 500ml of water for 30 minutes to 1 hour at 100°c.
Collect and separate the essential oil from the distilled mixture using a separating funnel and transfer it to dark glass bottles.
Store the calendula officinalis essential oil in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight and heat sources.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Lemon verbena essential oils helps with grief because they possess a calming and soothing quality that can help to ease emotional pain. The sweet, citrusy aroma of lemon verbena has been shown to have a profound impact on the emotional well-being, promoting feelings of serenity and calmness. As it lifts the spirits and calms the mind, lemon verbena essential oils can provide comfort during times of loss, allowing individuals to process their emotions and begin to heal from grief.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant Properties: Lemon Verbena Essential Oil's antioxidant properties help to reduce oxidative stress, which can contribute to feelings of sadness and hopelessness associated with grief.
Anxiolytic (Anxiety-Relieving) Properties: The oil's anxiolytic properties can help to calm the mind and body, reducing anxiety and worry that often accompany the grieving process.

Uplifting and Mood-Boosting Properties: Lemon Verbena Essential Oil has a uplifting and mood-boosting effect due to its citrusy scent, which can help to reduce feelings of sadness and depression, promoting emotional balance.
remedy_parts: Roots: Used to create a grounding and calming oil, helping to soothe emotional pain and promote feelings of stability during times of grief.
Seeds: Rich in anti-inflammatory properties, seeds help to reduce stress and anxiety associated with grief, promoting a sense of calm and inner peace.
remedy_recipe: Harvest high-quality verbena officinalis leaves and flowers on a sunny day.
Dry the harvested herbs using paper bags or air circulation for 7-10 days.
Steam distill dried verbena officinalis in a 5:1 ratio with distilled water for 30 minutes.
Filter and decant the essential oil within 24 hours of distillation.
Store the obtained verbena officinalis essential oil in a dark glass bottle with a tight lid for up to 6 months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Valerian essential oils helps with grief because it has a calming and soothing effect on the mind and body, allowing individuals to process their emotions more effectively. The sedative properties of valerian root oil can help ease anxiety and stress related to loss, promoting relaxation and reducing feelings of overwhelm. Additionally, the scent of valerian can stimulate the release of serotonin, a neurotransmitter involved in mood regulation, helping to lift spirits and promote emotional balance during difficult times.
remedy_properties: Sedative and calming effects: Valerian essential oil has a sedative and calming effect on the nervous system, which can help to reduce feelings of anxiety, stress, and emotional turmoil associated with grief.

Anti-inflammatory properties: Valerian essential oil has anti-inflammatory properties that may help to reduce physical tension and pain caused by grief, promoting relaxation and reducing symptoms of depression.
Antidepressant effects: Valerian essential oil has been shown to have antidepressant effects, which can help to alleviate feelings of sadness, hopelessness, and despair associated with grief.
remedy_parts: Roots: Valerian roots contain a high concentration of sesquiterpenes, which have been shown to have a calming effect on the nervous system, helping to alleviate symptoms of grief.

Buds: Valerian buds are rich in essential fatty acids and terpenoids, which can help to regulate emotional responses and promote relaxation, making them well-suited for use in essential oils for grief.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh valeriana officinalis roots and cut them into small pieces, ensuring proper drying before processing.
Steam distill the dried root pieces using a steam distillation apparatus at 100-120°c for 3-4 hours.
Collect the resulting essential oil in a clean container and store it in a cool dark place to preserve its properties.
Blend the valeriana officinalis essential oil with a carrier oil such as coconut or jojoba at a ratio of 2:1 for therapeutic use.
Label and date the prepared blend, and recommend a dosage of 3-5 drops per application, 2-3 times daily, for optimal relief from grief symptoms.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Lime essential oils helps with grief because of its uplifting and calming properties. The citrus scent of lime oil has a profound impact on the emotional state, promoting a sense of clarity and hope during times of loss. It can help to reduce feelings of anxiety and depression, allowing individuals to process their emotions more effectively. By incorporating herbal lime essential oils into daily routines, such as through aromatherapy or diffusion, individuals can find solace and begin to heal from their grief.
remedy_properties: Antidepressant and mood-enhancing: Citrus essential oils, such as limonene, have been shown to have antidepressant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of depression, anxiety, and grief.
Anxiolytic and calming: The aroma compounds in citrus essential oils, like beta-pinene, can promote relaxation, reduce stress and anxiety, and help regulate emotions during times of grief.
Stimulates emotional release: Citrus essential oils have been known to stimulate the release of emotions, allowing individuals to process and work through their grief more effectively.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the lime plant are used to make essential oils that help alleviate feelings of sadness and despair by grounding and calming the mind.
Buds: Lime buds are used in aromatherapy to soothe emotional pain and promote a sense of new beginnings, helping to lift spirits and reduce grief.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh tilia europaea flowers at dawn on a sunny day for maximum potency and quality.
Dry the harvested flowers in small batches using a food dehydrator set at 60 degrees celsius for six hours.
Steam-distill the dried flowers using a traditional copper still or a modern electric distiller with water ratio of 1:3 for three hours.
Filter the distilled essential oil through a coffee filter paper to remove any impurities and sedimentation particles.
Transfer the filtered essential oil into dark glass bottles with tight-fitting lids and store in a cool place for up to six months.

supplementary_best_treatment: The best way to treat grief with herbal essential oils is to combine Lavender's calming properties with Bergamot's uplifting effects. Add a few drops of each oil to your diffuser or mix with a carrier oil for a soothing massage. The calming scent of Lavender helps reduce anxiety, while Bergamot's citrus aroma promotes emotional balance and resilience, supporting the grieving process.
supplementary_causes: Ailments similar to grief that are treated with herbal essential oils are anxiety, depression, and stress. Lavender oil is often used to calm the mind and emotions, promoting relaxation and reducing feelings of anxiety and fear. Bergamot oil's uplifting and calming properties help alleviate symptoms of depression, while Ylang-Ylang oil's soothing aroma can ease stress and emotional tension. These essential oils can be inhaled directly, applied topically, or added to bath water for a sense of tranquility and emotional balance.
